subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Hamid! Upon thee be the Glory of God and His loving-kindness. Rejoice within thyself and give thou glad-tidings unto thine innermost being of the grace of God, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحمید علیک بهاء الله و عنایته افرح فی نفسک و بشر ذاتک بعنایه الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
